comment.body:
absolutely. expected a bounce here. In this market one needs to be very quick with puts in and out untill overall structure is confirmed broken. Alma ha d a great call and added this note of caution too so expected it to bounce and drift back up today. Until Opex passes do not think any fall will be more than 20-30 points intraday and will reverse quickly ( my view).

""For me, this means increasing weight towards downside hedges, but I wouldn’t size up until 6307.32 is confirmed to be broken. OpEx will not let it fall but tomorrow I will update the positioning.""
